title: Smoky Greek Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make stir-fry dish that combines the smokiness of Greek spices with the savory taste of onions and the crunch of stir-fry vegetables.
instructions: Heat the grapeseed oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until it starts to soften.
Add the mixed stir-fry vegetables and continue stir-frying for another 3-4 minutes.
Sprinkle the smoky Greek spice blend over the vegetables and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
